blended.narrative: Lakeridge is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,692 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
